data.body: Done definition update: Preserve all six SKIPPED_* tokens emitted by sprint-next-batch.sh (SKIPPED_OVERLAP, SKIPPED_BLOCKED_STORY, SKIPPED_OPUS_CAP, SKIPPED_IN_PROGRESS, SKIPPED_NEEDS_PLANNING, SKIPPED_DESIGN_AWAITING) — not only the four listed in the epic SCs. Preserve EPIC:, AVAILABLE_POOL:, BATCH_SIZE:, TASK: line formats. Preserve the full --json output schema (available_pool, opus_cap, skipped_overlap, skipped_opus_cap, skipped_blocked_story, skipped_design_awaiting, skipped_in_progress, skipped_needs_planning) consumed by write-blackboard.sh and sprint SKILL.md Phase 3/5. [adversarial-review, blue-team accepted]
